Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Is Krishna and Radha alive now

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2009-09-01 · 1 answers
Does Krishna and Radha alive now? Does Radha has to suffer because of krishna in every life. Does Radha has to go for test in every life for krishnas love. Does radha and krishna always share the pain. If one feels the pain does the other know about it? Why is this suffering for radha and Krishna.

If Radha touch the dead plant. The plant will become alive once again. The flower which krishna gave to radha. It never goes dry. It is always as fresh as the first time krishna gave her. Radha and krishna still love to get wet in rain like in brindavan. When both were united the whole place was energetic. No one dare to touch krishna or Radha during that time. Even the death stopped touching them and blessed them and went away. Krishna called Radha with love as Radhika. They are not seperate. Why is that in every life Radha and Krishna has to unite and get seperate. Is there any way does Radha can be united with Krishna in physical form. Who will answer me wht wrong Radha and Krishna did that they have to seperate and suffer being far away with each other.

Both Radha and Krishna are not in Karmabhoomi but in a far away places but the dreams still exist of they being together. Still now also they have their own character of fighting with each other and she go and hide in the forest and Krishna go behind her to bring her back. Today also Radha cannot see Krishna crying and Krishna cannot see a single drop in radha eyes. Far away from each other but how does Radha can feel the pain of krishna?

Today also Radha forget her all pain when ever Krishna sing for her. (Very bad voice though :-) )

Is any body help them to reunite them in this life?

May be I am a Mad person to say they are alive. But what I dream and What I felt is it wrong. If one day I meet and hug her and my eyes come full of tears seeing her I think then my life should be taken with out waiting for a second.
Because leaving far away from her is so much painful. Calling her every second is so painful with out seeing her.
user [438] · 2009-09-05
hare krsna..
jaya srila prabhupad..
everything happens because of the supreme will od the lord.. and regarding your question as to why radha and krsna dont SEEM to meet.. have you ever tried to understand scriptures as they are meant to be.. &quot;sorry, i may be sounding rude&quot;.. there are basically two ways of love, vipralambha and sambhoga...
vipralambha..love in separation..
sambhoga..love in meeting with eachother..
sambhoga aids love.... then vipralambha increases the desire to meet(and because its Krsna and Radhika here, its the best meeting).. and then sambhoga again gives unbound joy, pleasure and happiness to them both
and its only divine play that srimati radhika and krsna take part in those pastimes..
its actually because of mercy on all conditioned souls that such lilas are manifested..
and all activities that srimati radhika performs are not on this plane..
they are on the highest stage of prema..love to krsna...
to understand them isnt what we can do..
a few of the ecstatic reactions can be understood by hoing through the NECTAR OF DEVOTION(a summary study of bhakti rasamrita sindhu by sri rupa goswami) by srila prabhupada...
see the proof is that you feel soo much pain for Her position..
i know this is a very vague answer.. actually i am no authority to speak on this.. better read books by srila prabhupad..
they give us a clear overview as to how one avts in ecstatis love at different stages..
hare krsna..
forgive me for any offenses and mistakes..\

P.S.----- PLEASE STOP READING FROM UNAUTHORISED SOURCES... THEY MAY BE MISLEADING... A SINCERE REQUEST
